plan_steps.detail: Patch 151 defines what must be snapshotted before future live apply eligibility can pass.
plan_steps.title: Plan snapshot domain set

plan_steps.detail: Patch 152 should copy allowed files into Forge-owned snapshot memory and hash every artifact.
plan_steps.title: Create snapshot manifest

plan_steps.detail: Snapshot creation must be followed by independent file/hash readback.
plan_steps.title: Verify snapshot manifest

plan_steps.detail: Restoration must first occur into a Forge-owned shadow directory, not live paths.
plan_steps.title: Shadow restore rehearsal

plan_steps.detail: Shadow restore output must be compared against source snapshot and live state.
plan_steps.title: Forensic diff report

plan_steps.detail: No live write authority exists in Patch 151.
plan_steps.title: Live restore / live apply remains locked

plan_summary: Patch 151 is a plan-only safety layer.
It defines what Forge must snapshot before future live apply gates can pass.
It does not copy live project files, restore files, run shell commands, or grant write authority.
Live apply remains blocked until snapshot creation, shadow restore, rollback binding, sandbox/test binding, and human approval exist.

sequence_context.current_phase: S15 — Live apply eligibility gate v2

snapshot_domains.purpose: Capture the exact Forge executable/control surface before future write-capable gates.
snapshot_domains.title: Forge runtime core

snapshot_domains.purpose: Preserve the map, gates, and live-apply refusal state that governs future writes.
snapshot_domains.title: Build governance memory

snapshot_domains.purpose: Preserve canonical engine authority, test state, deferred state, and source-authority evidence.
snapshot_domains.title: Engine authority and test evidence

snapshot_domains.purpose: Preserve the read-only surfaces Nic uses to verify what Forge thinks is true.
snapshot_domains.title: Operator visibility surfaces

snapshot_domains.purpose: Capture evidence without modifying or overwriting the live audit log.
snapshot_domains.title: Audit tail capture
